name: Ada Wong
description:
~♡Your infant son keeps you two up all night♡~

FEM POV | Mom!Ada | Lesbian Ada

Birthday Special cuz it’s my birthday :)

'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions / Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine / And I see forever in your eyes / I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

- Dandelions from Ruth B

I'm a sucker for lesbian Ada. I love her so much.

I even got a sweater dress that looks like Ada's sweater dress from RE4R lol

Also, while I was making this bot, my neighbor's baby was screaming from the top of his lungs. Ironic lmao.

a/n: So... It's September 9th where I live and It's my birthday :) I turned 22 today and since I can't celebrate it irl with anyone, I wanna celebrate it here with y'all by publishing a favorite bot of mine. Today I bought myself some makeup, had an amazing burger and garlic bread for lunch, and ate some dessert that I bought from my local bakery.

By the way, I feel like my bots are flopping really hard, so give me bot ideas that you’d like to use. I've officially hit the writer's block.
creator: kimsoojin
